title: Grunwerg Windsor 2-Piece Steak Knife Set 2STKWDR/C, 18/0 Stainless Steel,Black,22cm (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
BRAND NEW PACKAGING: The updated Windsor Carded range features sleek, modern red and black packaging.
CONTAINS: Set contains 2 premium quality stainless steel steak knives.
MATERIAL: Made from high quality 18/0 stainless steel with a gleaming mirror polished finish.
ELEGANT DESIGN: The Steak Knives boast a traditional, timeless style that is sure to add a touch of class to any food setting.
HASSLE FREE CLEANING: The full Windsor range is dishwasher safe, but handwashing is recommended to maintain your product’s quality for longer.
description: The illustrious Windsor Range of carded serving ware and cutlery products was created by Grunwerg, a family company based in Sheffield – also known as the birthplace of stainless-steel cutlery. Each product in the range more than upholds the strong cutlery traditions of the Steel City, with elegant, traditional designs from sturdy 18/0 stainless steel making the Windsor Range a must buy if you’re looking to add some flair to your cutlery collection. The steak knife’s serrated blade and ergonomic handle will help you make short work of most meat-based dishes, making them perfect for everything from a barbecue to a fancy steak dinner!
